rawContent: Task: 260412-141225 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 260412-141225 completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each in 179.8s, creating src/utils/README.md documenting 60+ utility functions. Verify stage reported FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations (TS2344) in validator.ts across multiple page files, yet review-fix and ship stages executed without blocking. Review stage passed with only minor duplicate entry findings. Ship completed normally in local mode with no issue number. This run exhibits identical behavior to the 18 prior consecutive runs where verify FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression. | Pattern: Nineteenth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, 858, 863, 874, 260409-215133, 260409-220738, 260409-221218, 260409-222402, 260412-140927, 260412-141225) exhibiting identical verify-to-ship gate flaw: verify reports FAIL due to PagesPageConfig TS2344 type constraint violations or test failures, yet pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without any blocking mechanism. Autofix cannot resolve this class of structural type errors. The verifyExitCode conditional gate in ship stage template has been recommended in all 18 prior retrospectives without implementation. | Suggestion: Implement the verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template — this is the nineteenth consecutive run with the same flaw. Add a check that reads the verify stage exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL. This one-line configuration change to the ship stage template has been recommended 18 times without implementation — escalate to a P0 bug ticket with label 'urgent' and tag 'pipeline-gate-flaw' if unaddressed. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
